news.t: Alzprotect Announces FDA Clearance of IND for AZP2006 (Ezeprogind®) in Progressive Supranuclear Palsy (PSP)
Collect 12% Yields By Investing Like A Billionaire In 2025
FDA Clears Abionic's IVD CAPSULE PSP for the Early Detection of Sepsis

holdings.infoBox: PSP is an equity ETF with a total of 70 individual holdings. The top holdings are Blackstone stock at 5.39%, KKR & Co. at 5.10%, CVC Capital Partners at 4.79%, TPG Inc. at 4.70%, and EQT AB at 4.61%.

overview.description: The Invesco Global Listed Private Equity ETF (PSP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund tracks a modified market-cap weighted index of publicly listed private equity firms. PSP was launched on Oct 24, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: Red Rocks Global Listed Private Equity Index
